body_preview: Reduce `search_regex_error` count (57 occurrences in trajectory) by adding a recovery hint to the search tool's error message when a regex parse failure is detected, guiding the agent to retry with `regex=false`. Why this matters: `search_regex_error` is the single most frequent tool failure category (57 occurrences). These failures waste turns during assess
title: Add regex-error recovery hint to search tool error messages
